this file for a given year. Claim lines for other carrier/DME claims are a subset of the claims in the Part B 
carrier and DME data files. 

Types of services which may have been summarized in this other carrier category (OTHC) include 
ambulance, chiropractor, chemotherapy, vision, hearing, and speech services, etc. 

An event is defined as each line item that contains the relevant service. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: OTHC_EVENTS 

TYPE: NUM
